title: Personal Disc Player
description: A personal, portable Music Disc player/Jukebox for your convenience.  Now improved for Minecraft version 1.21.6+ with AudioPlayer mod support and support for (most) modded discs! It's the disc counterpart to our Personal Book Reader mod!
body:
![Personal Disc Player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c8b8bbfddb178d450f9570264a29ab415b14741.png)

## Description
Do your neighbors complain about your loud Jukebox? This mod adds a Personal Disc Player item that plays Music Disc sounds without disturbing your neighbors. Improved for 1.21.6+, now with [AudioPlayer](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer) support and support for (most) modded discs!

### Features (as of version 1.21.6-1.4.2):
- Personal Disc Player item, crafted with 8 of any wooden slabs and 1 Diamond
- Music Discs can be inserted and removed similar to the Bundle
- Once a disc is inserted, use the Personal Disc Player from your hotbar to play or restart the music
- Use the Personal Disc Player from your hotbar while sneaking to stop the music
- Once playing, the Personal Disc Player can be moved around within the user's inventory without stopping play
- Audio will stop when Personal Disc Player is dropped or placed into another inventory (this includes Bundles)
- Multiple Personal Disc Players can be playing audio in the player's inventory at the same time
- Personal Disc Player texture and tooltip update when a disc is inserted
- AudioPlayer mod support- play discs with custom audio via the Personal Disc Player
- Support for (most) modded discs (including [AudioPlayer Blanks](https://modrinth.com/mod/audioplayer-blanks))

## Support
Mod versions prior to 1.21.6-1.4.0 are no longer supported.

If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
